This video shown is version 1.1 not perfected but way better than version 1

📦Plugin info (Updated for V2)
Shared Body is a unique Minecraft plugin that lets two players share a single body, creating a chaotic and strategic co-op experience where one player controls movement while the other observes and supports.

🔧 What it Does
Shared Health & Inventory: Both players now share hearts and inventory slots in real-time.

Perspective Linking: One player is in full control, while the other sees everything through their eyes.

Action Bar Health Display: Always know the controller’s health via a custom action bar.

Early Swap Mechanic: The observing player can now hold shift for 5 seconds after 1:30 to take over early.

Automatic Timed Swaps: Swaps occur every 5 minutes if not triggered manually.

💡 Why Download This?
If you're looking for a fresh multiplayer challenge or a fun team-based minigame, Shared Body adds a new twist on collaboration and chaos. It's perfect for friends, streamers, or server events where coordination is key.

⚠️ Important Notes
Both players must use the /bind command to link.

Use /startsharedbody to begin the session.

Works best with exactly two players per shared pair.

Requires Minecraft version 1.20+ and Paper or Spigot server for full compatibility.
